title.en: But now, I have to believe it.

content.en:
"Ye Tian fought against the Shadow Geng Elder, and he still had an advantage!"

If one of the patriarchs had said this before the challenge, they would have not believed it.

But now, I have to believe it.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian and Elder Ying Geng kept fighting, crushing him the whole process.

Elder Ying Geng went all out, but he was still defeated by Ye Tian.

......

"The first sequence of supreme rules has actually comprehended the realm of perfection!" The first elder was also quite surprised.

The rules of the Supreme Dao have always been very difficult to comprehend, especially the rules of the first sequence of the Supreme Dao, and only a few or so of the elders have succeeded in comprehending them, and only a few elders have comprehended the rules of the first sequence of the Supreme Dao to the realm of perfection.

Only in the first sequence to the realm of Dao rules, Ye Tian was already enough to match the top few elders.

As long as Ye Tianxiu is promoted and completes a few more transformations of a supreme mythical body, he will definitely be able to rank among the top few elders.

Soon.

Elder Ying Geng was forced to admit defeat, because there was no point in continuing to fight.

"I throw in the towel!"

As soon as Elder Ying Geng's words came out, it meant that Ye Tian had become the thirty-fifth elder.

Of course.

Shadow Geng Patriarchs can now challenge other Elders within the top 36, and if they win, they can continue to be among them.

Really.

Elder Ying Geng chose to continue the challenge, but he challenged the thirty-sixth elder, and when the thirty-sixth elder came, his injuries would be almost healed.

"Thirty-six veterans, who else wants to challenge?"

The First Elder asked.

Then.

The twenty-fifth patriarch came out and said, "I want to challenge the eighteenth patriarch!"

"It's the twenty-fifth patriarch Ling He!"

Many patriarchs secretly said.

Patriarch Ling He is very low-key, but his strength is not weak, and he is also a patriarch who has survived from an incomparably ancient era to the present, but he challenged the eighteenth patriarch unexpectedly.

The Eighteenth Patriarch was also here, and he accepted the challenge of Elder Linghe.

Soon.

The two sides fought.

Then.

Elder Ling He actually showed the realm of the first sequence of supreme dao rules, shocking all the elders.

All along, Elder Ling He had shown the second sequence of supreme dao rules, but now he had exposed the first sequence of supreme dao rules, and it was not a preliminary comprehension, obviously it had been a long time since he comprehended it.

"It's so hidden!"

A group of patriarchs said secretly.

Of course, it's not just the Linghe elders, many of the elders are very deeply hidden, and there are even elders who have not entered the top thirty-six, and their strength may be even stronger than those among the top thirty-six elders, but they have obtained a very amazing innate primordial treasure, and they don't want to expose the innate primordial treasure.

Some top-notch innate primordial treasures, which only improve their strength, may make their combat power skyrocket by ten times, but once they are exposed, it is not good, and it is normal to hide them.

So, don't underestimate any of the patriarchs.

Especially the top thirty-six veterans, any one of them has the potential to hide more strength.

Bang!!!!

The twenty-fifth elder and the eighteenth elder fought for a long time, showing incomparably terrifying combat effectiveness, and one by one the innate primordial treasures were exposed, just to win.

In the end, the twenty-fifth patriarch, Ling He, was defeated and became the new eighteenth patriarch.

But after that, there are no veterans to continue to challenge, and the ranking is still fixed and will not change for the time being.

Another time passed.

The thirty-sixth elder returned, and the Shadow Geng elder challenged the thirty-sixth elder, but lost.

At this point, the Elder Ying Geng was kicked out of the ranks of the thirty-six veterans, and he was immediately extremely depressed.

But his strength is not good, and if he loses, he loses.

......

The headquarters of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, the Hall of the Elders.

Ye Tian was brought into the treasure house of the Hall of Elders by the First Elder.

At this time, the first patriarch said: "Elder Ye Tian, there are some innate primordial treasures in the treasure house of the patriarchal hall, although the number is not much, but the patriarchal hall has a rule, and all new patriarchs who enter the thirty-six patriarchal rankings for the first time will get a congenital primordial treasure for free." "

"Get a free piece of Innate Primordial Treasure !!!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Is the Innate Origin Alliance so generous, even the Innate Origin Treasure is sent directly?

The first elder said: "The resources in this treasure house are often jointly developed into a treasure land, and some of the resources are sent into the treasure house, and a few of them are purchased from below, but those who are weak to the Dao realm do not know it. Gradually, a small number of innate primordial treasures were stored in the treasure house, and it was difficult to distribute, so this plan was chosen. The top thirty-six patriarchs all agreed, but they could only choose one. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian then followed the First Elder into the treasure house.

There are a lot of resources in the treasure house, and almost all of them are good things, and bad treasures will not be placed here.

Ye Tian came to the place where the Innate Primordial Treasures were stored, and there were a total of seventeen Innate Primordial Treasures.

"There are seventeen Innate Primordial Treasures here, you can choose one of them!"

The first elder did not introduce the role of the seventeen innate primordial treasures, because he had not refined them either, so naturally he didn't know very well, and what innate primordial treasures he could obtain depended on his luck.

Ye Tian urged the eye of appraisal to identify these innate primordial treasures, if the value was very high, he chose it.

Soon.

One by one, the innate primordial treasures were identified by Ye Tian, and the specific uses were also identified one by one.

When all the seventeen Innate Primordial Treasures had been identified, he chose the one that was most useful to him.

Innate Primordial Treasure: The Heavenly Sword Disc can be activated by several peer-to-minded Supreme Dao Realms to burst out into a terrifying Heavenly Sword Array, and it can also be integrated into the Innate Origin Domain to form an indestructible offensive and defensive array

For Ye Tian, this innate primordial treasure has the greatest effect.

Although there are other Innate Primal Treasures that assist in cultivation, there are also Innate Primordial Treasures that assist in cultivation, but they coincide with the functions of the Innate Primordial Treasures in his hands.

And the Heavenly Sword Disk is different, if it is integrated into the human domain, let a few replica bodies sit in the town, and control the innate sword disk, even the first elder may not be able to break through the human domain.

In this way, he will be truly at ease.

Even if the Innate Origin Domain Alliance and the Supreme Dao Void Demon start a full-scale war in the future, he is expected to protect the Human Domain, so that the human race will not be destroyed, and he will not let himself be destroyed and fall.

So.

The Heavenly Sword Disc is too useful.

"I choose this!"

Ye Tian said to an innate primordial treasure in front of him.

"Good!"

The First Elder nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian took away the Heavenly Sword Disk, and his heart was extremely excited, but he didn't show it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came out of the Hall of Elders and returned to the Human Domain.

As soon as he could, he began to study the Heavenly Sword Disk, striving to develop the ability of the Heavenly Sword Disk.
